member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimbaInit.UlatEnableMode.Disabled
member.summary: Mode to clear all bypass data.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimbaInit.UlatEnableMode.Enabled
member.summary: Production Mode to read file path from uservar.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimbaInit.PrimeSimbaInitTestMethod
member.summary: Method to be run at some point in the Init flow to enable Simba.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimbaInit.PrimeSimbaInitTestMethod.UlatEnableMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the ULAT enable mode (OFF/PROD).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimbaInit.PrimeSimbaInitTestMethod.UlatFileType
member.summary: Gets or sets the ULAT input file format (LOT/UNIT).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimbaInit.PrimeSimbaInitTestMethod.UnitIdentificationMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets the unit identification Method (VID/ULT/VID_AND_ULT).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimbaInit.PrimeSimbaInitTestMethod.SsidKeyForUltData
member.summary: Gets or sets the SSID key to access ULT/eFuse data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimbaInit.PrimeSimbaInitTestMethod.UlatFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the ulat file. If it's empty, Simba will take the ulat file from the SCVars.SC_ULAT_FILE user variable.
